# GoalOS Take-Care Console v65

The Take-Care Console is the simplest user-facing GoalOS entrypoint. A visitor types a public-safe objective in plain language. The page runs entirely in the browser and prepares a local `GoalOSTakeCareReceipt` with a Mission Contract, proof plan, Verifier Mesh, Governed Decision State, route handoff, and alternatives.

## Public-safe boundary

No account. No form submission. No wallet connection. No token approval. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No network request from the console. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data retained.

## Route

`/goalos-take-care.html`

## Canonical route count

69 public routes.

## Relationship to existing pages

Nothing is removed. Ask GoalOS remains the question router. Mission Autopilot remains the mission-package page. GoalOS Command Console remains the advanced route/receipt console. v65 becomes the most user-friendly front door for non-technical users.
